name: redis-local-docker
description:
Local Redis 7 via docker compose. Adds compose.redis.yml (separate file so it composes cleanly with postgres-local-docker), src/lib/redis.ts (singleton ioredis client), and infra:redis:* npm scripts. Pattern: production-tested.yml redis service.

Why a separate compose file? It lets postgres-local-docker own docker-compose.yml without fence-merge complexity. To start both: `pnpm infra:up` (postgres) + `pnpm infra:redis:up` — or use the combined script.
